arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m0plus -mthumb -Wall -O0 -g -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -g -mcpu=cortex-m0plus -mthumb -T D:/ti/mspm0_sdk/source/ti/devices/msp/m0p/linker_files/gcc/mspm0g3507.lds -Wl,-Map=demo.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage -Wl,--cref CMakeFiles/demo.dir/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/demo.dir/ti_msp_dl_config.c.obj CMakeFiles/demo.dir/D_/ti/mspm0_sdk/source/ti/devices/msp/m0p/startup_system_files/gcc/startup_mspm0g350x_gcc.c.obj -o demo.elf  D:\ti\mspm0_sdk\source\ti\driverlib\lib\ticlang\m0p\mspm0g1x0x_g3x0x\driverlib.a -lm
